code: import{useState}from'react';import{Link,Navigate,useLocation,useNavigate}from'react-router-dom';import{useAuthContext}from'../../context/AuthContext';import{PATHS}from'../../router/paths';import'./style.css';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";export default function LoginPage(){var _location$state,_location$state$from;const navigate=useNavigate();const location=useLocation();const{isLoggedIn,login}=useAuthContext();const[name,setName]=useState('');const[errorMessage,setErrorMessage]=useState('');const nextPath=((_location$state=location.state)===null||_location$state===void 0?void 0:(_location$state$from=_location$state.from)===null||_location$state$from===void 0?void 0:_location$state$from.pathname)||PATHS.HOME;if(isLoggedIn){return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Navigate,{to:nextPath,replace:true});}const handleSubmit=event=>{event.preventDefault();if(name.trim()&&name.trim().length<2){setErrorMessage('Please enter at least 2 characters for the name.');return;}setErrorMessage('');login(name);navigate(nextPath,{replace:true,state:{flashMessage:`Welcome, ${name.trim()||'React Student'}!`}});};const handleDemoLogin=()=>{setErrorMessage('');login('Demo User');navigate(nextPath,{replace:true,state:{flashMessage:'Welcome, Demo User!'}});};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("main",{className:"login-page",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("section",{className:"login-card ui-card",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"login-kicker",children:"Login"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{children:"Enter the workspace"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"login-text",children:"This is a simple demo sign-in for the project.
